Pricing
🎉 Create a Board

Celebrate every
career milestone.

A collaborative milestone board your whole team signs — congratulations, career highlights, and shared memories — delivered as a stunning keepsake they'll treasure for years.

Create a Milestone Board

Flat fee · $5 per board · Unlimited signers · Yours forever

⭐ Work Anniversary · 5 Years
"Five years of brilliance, dedication and leadership. You have made this company a better place every single day. Here's to the next five and many more milestones ahead!"
ANM+19
22 teammates signed
🏅1 Year
🥈3 Years
🏆5 Years
One board · One price$5

How it works

Four powerful steps to celebrate a career milestone worth remembering

Create Board

Start a milestone board and set up the honoured team member

1Dashboard

Collect Memories

Gather shoutouts, stories and congratulations from the whole team

2Collaborate

Award Plaque

Premium printed award plaque and milestone book shipped to their desk

3Keepsake

Celebrate!

Share a private link, export as PDF and celebrate the milestone together

4Share & Reveal

Hover over each card to explore

Work Milestone Memory Map

Colleagues from New York to Singapore, Toronto to Sydney celebrate a career milestone. Watch the world light up with pride and congratulations!

“
A

Aarav Sharma

Engineering Lead📍 New Delhi, India
1 hour ago

“ Congratulations on reaching this remarkable milestone! Your dedication, hard work, and commitment have made a lasting impact on the team. We're grateful for everything you've contributed over the years. ”
